message:
test(proptest): add 5 property tests for NamespaceIsolationConfig serde + behavioral invariants

Cover serde roundtrip, from_config policy preservation, permissive/strict
cross-tenant boundary behavior, and disabled config preset. Total: 24 tests
(19 existing + 5 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
